description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a collared, button-up shirt and fitted trousers, giving a formal or business-casual appearance. The figure has short, neatly styled hair and wears glasses, adding to a professional look. The shirt is tucked into the pants, which are secured with a belt, and the shoes are sturdy and appropriate for urban walking. The hands are relaxed and open at the sides, and the overall build is average, with a straight, upright posture. The facial features are defined, and the figure's proportions are realistic, suitable for representing a typical city pedestrian. The clothing and accessories suggest this individual could be a professional or office worker in an urban environment.
description: A male adult in formal attire with glasses, short hair, and a straight, upright stance, dressed for an urban or business setting.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, glasses, belt, and relaxed hands, with facial features clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fit of the shirt and pants, and the shoe style.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, belt, and pants, as well as the hairstyle and shoe heels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm position, and the overall silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: button-up shirt and fitted trousers with a belt, formal or business-casual style, accessorized with glasses
